---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new MCP tool, gesture, or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this needed? What use case does it unlock?

## Proposed API
If this is a new MCP tool, describe the proposed interface:

```python
# Tool name
android_new_tool(
    param1="value",   # What it does
    param2=123,       # What it does
)
# Returns: ...
```

## Implementation Notes
Any thoughts on how this could be implemented (AccessibilityService API, ADB command, etc.).

## Alternatives Considered
What workarounds exist today? Why are they insufficient?
